article_items.title: Company : The Verge AI
article_items.description: [HIGH] Here comes new Siri again Company : The Verge AI Summary : Apple has been on its back foot, AI-wise, for the past few years. article_items.title: Company : The Guardian Tech
article_items.description: [HIGH] Anthropic says the world should have option to ‘pause’ on AI Company : The Guardian Tech Summary : US firm says it will convene policymakers for discussion of dangers, in post detailing progress of its Claude model Anthropic has floated the idea of a worldwide “temporary pause” on AI development – Link :
